channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: President Trump says he is reviewing a new Iranian proposal to end the war
item.description: President Donald Trump says he is reviewing a new Iranian proposal to end the war but expressed skepticism it would be acceptable.

item.title: Florida sheriff identifies body found in Tampa Bay as 2nd missing student from Bangladesh
Kentucky man charged in deadly bank robbery after high-speed chase
